## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 9 articles scheduled, including Linux podcast; backlog cleared](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [SEO performance improving: rankings approaching top 10 for key categories, unaffected by recent Google update](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic increasing: ChatGPT overtaking Perplexity as top referrer, indicating strong brand recognition](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Need to analyze YouTube analytics for podcast performance and referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [9 articles scheduled this week, including Linux podcast](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Podcast backlog cleared last week, Adam reviewing](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [5 articles published, remaining to be done by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [New CI/CD testing topics added to content queue (15 new topics over 1 year)](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Rankings improving across categories:](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [Metrics: on cusp of top 10](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [Multi-agent and Multimodal: approaching top 10](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [LLM evaluations: improved from \~25 to 14 average ranking](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Unaffected by major Google update earlier this month](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Clicks stable, no significant declines observed](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### LLM Referral Traffic

  - [ChatGPT now top referrer, overtaking Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Strong correlation with branded searches](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [ChatGPT favors brand recognition more than Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Current strategy: focus on good SEO principles, as LLMs rely on Google's algorithm](https://fathom.video/share/FwAGQxunsSZacxvXcfHjTxJKXHpKxvb1?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### YouTube Analytics Access

  - Conor to provide view access to <team@growthxlabs.com>
